import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  mut b = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    b = x
  when None
    b = 0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      let num = sign * val
      if num % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + num
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let num = sign * val
  if num % 2 == 0
    sum = sum + num
  end
end

print("sum_even=#{sum}")
